titleStmt.title: SII 10.261: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 261. (A.R. No. 717 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF KĒŚAVASVĀMI, DUGGIRALA, TENALI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 113[6.] (Bhāva ?)

summary.p: Refers to the delimitation of the boundaries between Duggaṟēlapūṇḍi on the one hand and Īvani, Duggamapūṇḍi and Moṟamapūṇḍi on the other hand, made by Mallaparāja and Rudrarāja under the orders of king Gaṇapatidēva, given after he occupied the Velanāṇḍu country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 113
nēṁṭṭi bhavasaṁvatsara kā
¨rttikaśuddhaAṣṭamiyu
ravivāramuna duggaṟēla
pūṁḍi Aśēṣamahājanu
lunu Ivani duggamapūṁ
ḍi moṟamapūṁḍi polame
ra sammaṁdhamu gaṇapatidēva
mahārāju divipaṟi

velanāṁḍu cēkoni tanavegga
ḍla mallaparājunu rudrapa
rājunu bhūmi nilpaṁ butte
ṁcce duggaṟēlapūṁḍiki
Ivaniki duggamapūṁḍiki
moṟamapūṁḍiki polame
ravivāda mai reṁḍumēralavāru
nu peggaḍlaṁ gānaṁ bōyina vāru ma
hājanāla naḍacikoṁ ḍaniri
Ivani boḍrāju koḍuku
sūraparāju polameri naḍapiṁcci naḍa
cina vāṁḍu duggaṟēlapūṁ
ḍḍi kuṁccavarānakū bi va
rājñi padunāluvu nāḍlu
ja[jē ?]Iṁcce Ājñēyataḥ Āvu
ṟukōṭitū¨rppu vāInimaṁ
ṭṭa Ivani pū¨rvataḥ polame

rakuṁṭṭa Aiśānyataḥ gapalli
mukōṭitū¨rppukuṁṭṭa Iniḍa
Ini Uttarataḥ nāvulakuṁṭa A
naṁtarataḥ guruvuguṁṭa Anaṁtta
ṭhataḥ dēvatakuṁṭa Anaṁtarataḥ ma
lipāṭikuṁṭa vāyavyataḥ pola
merakuṁṭa Anaṁtaramu dakṣiṇamu
kuṁṭa paścimataḥ polamerakuṁṭa

Anaṁttarama tuṁggabhadrādēvi pa
ścimataḥ polimerakuṁṭa Anaṁtta
rama nairityāṁ tuṁggabhadrādēvi da
kṣiṇamumukha maina maḍuka
Anaṁttaramu dakṣiṇataḥ Inu

pagaruvu polamerakuṁṭa
Ipolamera naḍacuṭa lēdanna vāru
gaṁga kaṟta vēI gavilalaṁ boḍcina
vāru peddakoḍku kapālānaṁ gu
ḍcina vāru
Digital edition of SII 10.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
